name: DLL Loaded Via AllocConsole and RunDLL32
description: Detects DLL loading through the AllocConsole function and rundll32.

parameters.name: timestamp
parameters.description: The timestamp of the process creation event.

parameters.name: process_guid
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the `rundll32.exe` process.

parameters.name: process_path
parameters.description: The full path to the `rundll32.exe` executable.

parameters.name: process_command_line
parameters.description: The full command line used, containing both a DLL reference and 'allocconsole'.

parameters.name: user
parameters.description: The user account under which `rundll32.exe` was executed.
